notes: Gameplay fixes + match flow (Bug Testing Season). Matches now end with a Win/Lose screen; Netcode tears down cleanly so back-to-back matches connect; on a loss you see the opponent's hand & Life. Card fixes: [Double Attack] deals 2 Life damage (and can close at 1 Life); counter events like Blaze Slice work; Black Uta is K.O.'d by Characters; Gum-Gum Bell adds the right card; Black Luffy's leader effect and Shanks' defensive effect fire; many battle-effect hangs fixed. QoL: summoning-sick characters greyed out, a shield on active Blockers, play a 6th character over one to trash it, and your deck searches are now hidden from your opponent.
